title: pteris rupestris
intro: Pteris rupestris, also known as rocky fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae and is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pteris rupestris include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Pteris rupestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
